column4: Debit-No-Credit Loop — reversal does not auto-trigger
Duplicate Debit on Retry — history retry creates second charge
Silent Debit on Timeout — debit processes despite UI timeout
Idempotency Breach — same key produces two ledger entries
Cross-Channel Balance Lag — POS debit not reflected for 5+ mins
USSD Transactions Missing in App — absent from mobile ledger
App Crash on Offline Launch — crashes without network at start
No Offline Transaction Queue — transfers silently discarded
No SMS OTP Fallback — push failure locks out user entirely
No Contextual Dispute CTA — must navigate to Help menu
No Automated Refund Engine — failed+debited needs manual request
Dispute SLA Breach (48h+) — zero acknowledgement after 48 hours
No Dispute Status Tracking — no in-app tracking feature exists
